phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bar counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la barra para pedir?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh es-TAH la BAH-rah pah-rah peh-DEER?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del local, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL loh-KAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back of the venue, on the left.

responses.english: At the back of the venue, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL loh-KAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del local, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a table for group
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tenéis mesa para un grupo grande?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, teh-NEH-is MEH-sah pah-rah oon groo-poh GRAHN-deh?

likely_response.local: En la terraza, hay espacio suficiente.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tehr-RAH-thah AHY eh-spah-THEE-oh soo-fee-thee-EHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: On the terrace, there is enough space.

responses.english: On the terrace, there is enough space.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tehr-RAH-thah AHY eh-spah-THEE-oh soo-fee-thee-EHN-teh
responses.local: En la terraza, hay espacio suficiente.

phrases.intent_en: Ask whether to pay at bar or table
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿se paga en barra o mesa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, seh PAH-gah ehn BAH-rrah oh MEH-sah?

likely_response.local: Puede pagar aquí mismo o en caja.
likely_response.pronunciation: poo-EH-deh pah-GAHR ah-k-Í MEE-smoh OH EHN KAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay right here or at the register.

responses.english: You can pay right here or at the register.
responses.phonetic: poo-EH-deh pah-GAHR ah-k-Í MEE-smoh OH EHN KAH-hah
responses.local: Puede pagar aquí mismo o en caja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the daily specials board is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la pizarra de los especiales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah pee-SAH-rah deh los es-peh-SYAH-les?

likely_response.local: En la pared del fondo, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH pah-REHD DEHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the back wall, on the right.

responses.english: At the back wall, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH pah-REHD DEHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la pared del fondo, a la derecha.
